mermaidSyntax:
classDiagram
    class EthicalPrinciple {
        +String name
        +String description
        +evaluate()
        +report_violation()
    }
    
    class Beneficence {
        +String risk_benefit_ratio
        +assess_harm()
        +assess_benefit()
    }
    
    class NonMaleficence {
        +Float harm_threshold
        +identify_risks()
    }
    
    class Autonomy {
        +String consent_type
        +verify_informed_consent()
        +assess_capacity()
    }
    
    class Justice {
        +String selection_criteria
        +evaluate_fair_selection()
        +assess_burden_distribution()
    }
    
    class IRBReview {
        +String protocol_id
        +String review_type
        +List committee_members
        +full_board_review()
        +expedited_review()
        +exempt_determination()
    }
    
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- Beneficence
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- NonMaleficence
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- Autonomy
    EthicalPrinciple <|-- Justice
    
    IRBReview ..> Beneficence : uses
    IRBReview ..> NonMaleficence : uses
    IRBReview ..> Autonomy : uses
    IRBReview ..> Justice : uses
